purpose: AP-wide sign-out masterclass contract modeled after the Breast Sign-Out Masterclass: image-first, case-list navigation, staged reveal, exact report language, synoptic practice, and governed local image acquisition.

requiredAssetKinds: PDF page capture when source is a document

displayFormat.layout: left case rail, large uniform image stage, right observation/reveal panel, lower synoptic/report panels
displayFormat.imageSizing: uniform large object-contain with stable dimensions
displayFormat.navigation: clicking a case opens a single focused case, not infinite scroll
displayFormat.learnerLanguage: clinical sign-out language only; no web-development annotations

releaseGate: Every case has at least one visual evidence slot.
Every resection case has synoptic field practice.
Every gross-only case has gross documentation fields.
Every acquired image is stored locally with source provenance.
Strict source and file validation must pass before release.

cases.title: Barrett esophagus dysplasia biopsy
cases.diagnosticTask: Conduct an image-first biopsy sign-out for Barrett esophagus dysplasia biopsy, including the key microscopic observation, differential diagnosis, ancillary decision, and exact diagnostic line.

primaryActions.label: Select case
primaryActions.result: focused case workspace opens without page-length search

primaryActions.label: Reveal next step
primaryActions.result: only the next diagnostic reasoning step appears

primaryActions.label: Reveal final diagnosis
primaryActions.result: report-ready language appears after observation sequence

secondaryActions.label: Reset case
secondaryActions.result: case returns to image-first state

secondaryActions.label: Open source/provenance
secondaryActions.result: source opens without interrupting the case state

diagnosticSteps.prompt: Name the first visual finding that drives the differential.
diagnosticSteps.expectedObservation: The learner states the dominant histologic pattern and the compartment involved before naming a diagnosis.

diagnosticSteps.prompt: State the highest-risk diagnostic or reporting decision.
diagnosticSteps.expectedObservation: The learner states the entity, key mimic, and whether ancillary testing is necessary.

diagnosticSteps.prompt: Dictate the final report line.
diagnosticSteps.expectedObservation: The final line is concise, clinically usable, and report-ready.

cases.reportingTarget: Barrett esophagus dysplasia biopsy: final diagnostic line plus all clinically required qualifiers and ancillary/protocol fields.
pitfalls: Letting the diagnosis appear before the learner has described the image.
Using vague teaching language instead of exact report language.
